programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Voyage to Danger
programme.desc: Someone sent orders to assassinate Lupin. Will he survive or die trying!?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #6 Dragon of Doom
programme.desc: On the bottom of the ocean, within the sunken Titanic, the golden dragon statue waits. When Lupin and the gang are hired to retrieve it, Goemon recognizes the dragon as one of his clan's treasures. Now, he's ready to fight his own friends to protect it!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #7 The Pursuit of Harimao's Treasure
programme.desc: To retrieve the Harimao's Treasure, Lupin and the gang must gather three lost statues. Lupin reluctantly partners with the aging "double-O" MI-6 agent Sir Archer and his granddaughter Diana to gather the statues.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #8 The Secret of Twilight Gemini
programme.desc: As Lupin's mentor Don Dolune lies on his deathbed, he hands the master thief a gift: the diamond named Twilight. But it's only half of the treasure-the other half of the Twilight can be found in Morocco…

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 4/6/2012: The Rays rally in the bottom of the 9th inning to walk-off against the Yankees with run-scoring hits by Ben Zobrist and Carlos Pena in a comeback win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The Mets' storied franchise had gone 50 years without throwing a no-hitter. After numerous close calls, history was finally made on June 1, 2012 when Johan Santana needed 134 pitches to hold the Cardinals hitless in an 8-0 win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Felix Hernandez had never thrown a no-hitter throughout the first seven years of his career, but on August 14, 2012, the King was perfect for 27 straight outs against the Rays to throw the first perfect game in Mariners history.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/5/12: In what would be Chipper Jones' final game of his career, the Braves took on the Cardinals in the NL Wild Card Game, which was highlighted by a controversial infield fly rule in the 8th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/18/12: Max Scherzer struck out 10 batters and Miguel Cabrera homered to lead the Tigers in Game 4 of the ALCS, completing a four-game sweep of the Yankees.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: MST3K: The Batwoman
programme.desc: Emily's crew watch a scantily-clad Mexican superhero take on a mad scientist and his aquatic super-soldiers in THE BATWOMAN (1968).

programme.title: MST3K: The Christmas Dragon
programme.desc: All three hosts watch a group of precocious orphans attempt save a dying Father Christmas in THE CHRISTMAS DRAGON (2014).

programme.title: MST3K: Invasion Of The Neptune Men
programme.desc: Our heroes discover just how boring an alien attack on Tokyo can be when they view an anti-vehicle for Sonny Chiba.

programme.title: MST3K: The Creeping Terror
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots watch The Creeping Terror (1964), with its infamous walking-carpet monster, and parody Love, American Style (1969).

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera

programme.title: MST3K: The Dead Talk Back
programme.desc: Metaphysics helps to solve a murder case while Mike and the Bots impersonate the Grateful Dead.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: Elementary

programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Teneal y Richard cuentan historias diferentes, cada uno alegando que el otro no es apto para ser padre. La verdad se limitará a una prueba con el detector de mentiras, y los resultados serán impactantes.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Hoy Danny por fin está listo para enfrentarse al hombre ausente de su vida y responder a las preguntas de su vida. Steven da varias excusas para no ver a su hijo, pero ¿es posible redimirse?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos

programme.desc: After a couple of days without a decent pick, Mike and Frank look up a Georgia collector they've heard about. He's got a storage shed that's jam-packed with curios and movie memorabilia from his family's drive-in theater.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle has a sketchy lead. She's found an incredible collection but the bad news is it's owned by a reluctant seller. However, once inside the man's jam-packed barn.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank comb through a master collector's untouched outbuildings in North Carolina. After getting past a few petrified hams they find a true gem, a 1950 Studebaker that Mike falls in love with.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank visit a local legend in North Carolina. After picking through an accumulation of school busses and a burned-down storage house.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars run for their lives when they come face-to-face with the fire-breathing, 31-ton mammoth Robosaurus.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars zoom in on a long lost picture by America's most famous photographer Ansel Adams.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Make money with the Pawn Stars as they are presented with a one of a kind U.S. postage printing plate from 1862. Will the guys trek through rain or heat or gloom of night to make a deal or will they return this one to sender?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have an opportunity to buy one of the most recognizable cars of all time: The Batmobile. Will they use every gadget on their tool-belt for this set of wheels?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Batter up with the Pawn Stars when an autographed photo of Babe Ruth slides into the shop. Will Rick go into extra innings for this rare piece of baseball memorabilia or will a tough negotiation cause him to swing and miss?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get revved up with the Pawn Stars as they check out a rare REO Flying Cloud hot rod from the 1930s. Will Rick muster the strength to crank up an offer for this classic ride or will the deal take a detour and sputter out?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare for battle when a one-man submarine surfaces at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars take evasive action when a Cold War era heat-seeking missile guidance system locks onto the shop. Will the guys engage and try to blast this deal out of the sky or is this former military secret still too hot to handle?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In aptly named Pickens, South Carolina, the guys scour the sprawling inventory of a father-and-son picking duo.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th installment of the series pits Bond (Pierce Brosnan) against a powerful media mogul (Jonathan Pryce) and his wife (Teri Hatcher) who has a secret past with Bond.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: In the 19th film of the franchise, James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) is once again pitted against Valentin Zukovsky (Robbie Coltrane), the Russian mobster from Goldeneye. Judi Dench returns as M and Desmond Llewelyn returns as Q.

programme.title: Sólo para sus ojos
programme.desc: James Bond se ve inmerso en una de sus más intensas aventuras en este paquete de acción, de increíbles acrobacias, encuentros apasionados y excitantes enfrentamientos.

programme.title: En la mira de los asesinos
programme.desc: Roger Moore llena la pantalla de humor, elegancia y encanto. Bond se enfrenta a Max Zorin (Christopher Walken), quien busca controlar el mercado de microchips, incluso si significa matar a millones para lograrlo.

programme.title: Su nombre es peligro
programme.desc: Equipado con agudos instintos y una licencia para matar, James Bond enfrenta a mercaderes de armas diabólicos decididos a dominar el mundo en esta emocionante y tumultuosa aventura.

programme.title: Licencia para matar
programme.desc: James Bond se lanza en su aventura más apasionada -- no por su país, no por la justicia, sino por venganza personal. Timothy Dalton aporta urgencia, encanto y determinación mortal en su papel como el agente 007.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: John Wick is on the run after killing a member of the international assassins' guild, and with a $14 million price tag on his head, he is the target of hit men and women everywhere.

programme.title: Die Hard
programme.desc: A New York City cop faces a terrorist group in his wife's office building.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The outbreak of World War III has occurred, leaving a group of mid-Westernrn high school students turned refugees to slowly organize themselves into an effective guerilla force.

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: When Russian neo-nationalists hijack Air Force One, the world's most secure aircraft, the President is faced with the decision to give in to terrorist demands or sacrifice the country's dignity and the lives of his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!

programme.title: Die Hard
programme.desc: A New York City cop faces a terrorist group in his wife's office building.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species – polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) – that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: According to recent scientific research, more than 450 different kinds of animals engage in homosexual activity.

programme.title: Monkey Hunters
programme.desc: Lions rarely hunt baboons because they are hard to catch and usually not worth the risk or effort. But there is one place in Africa's Great Rift Valley where baboons are plentiful and lions have learned to catch them.

programme.title: Grizzly Man
programme.desc: Werner Herzog (Cave of Forgotten Dreams) crafts a compelling documentary look at wildlife preservationist Timothy Treadwell, who lived unarmed among grizzly bears in Alaska.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Utila

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: Fish is commonly known as a light, very delicate and tasty food source.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Zimbabwe's stunning lake Kariba. This time she's touring the area on the luxurious Karabezi Houseboat Cruiser. Joined by fishing experts, Craig and Mark, she attempts to catch the notorious tiger fish.

programme.title: Uncaged
programme.desc: In this episode, we travel to America's heartland featuring incredible animals including the badger, wolverine, blue heron, sandhill crane, whitetail deer, raccoon, and beaver.

programme.title: Last Paradises, Symphony of Life - Underwater World of Australia
programme.desc: Australia stands for tourism icons like the Ayers Rock, the Pinnacles and the Kakadu National Park.

programme.title: Blue Water Savages
programme.desc: Robin and Eli encounter the oceanic whitetip shark, one of the most dangerous sharks in the world. They are in the Bahamas to understand more about this predator, infamous for snacking on ship wreck survivors.

programme.title: Secrets of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Rugged rocks, blue sea and idyllic, sandy beaches - this is the Mediterranean as we know it.

programme.title: Elephants of Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: The elephant is the largest and most impressive of all the animals that live on and around Mount Kilimanjaro. Take a journey of exploration, adventure and revelation as we follow their footsteps up Kilimanjaro.

programme.title: Nomads of the Serengeti
programme.desc: This is one of the greatest migrations in nature: the wildebeest migration. For just over 3 months, Jean Du Plessis follows them from the crossing of the Mara River to the mass birthing grounds, where millions of animals are in constant motion.

programme.title: Human Prey
programme.desc: What's it like to be hunted down by the ocean's most powerful predator? A diver ends up inside the jaws of a Great White; an Alabama triathlete becomes the target of a bull shark; and, a spearfisherman inadvertently ends up as bait for a Great White.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: Shocked by the devastation of their home, Crystal decides to leave the Graveyard forcing the troop to live as nomads in the forest. Feisty Tornado leader Amazon sets her sights on the vacated territory.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti
programme.desc: Explore the many different concepts of family in the natural world. See how animals get together, raising of cubs and chicks, and learn how family bonds can determine an animal’s fate.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote gets stung by a tarantula hawk, which boasts the world's second most painful sting!

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A single mother is kidnapped, stabbed and left for dead by three hardened criminals and her heroic survival is unforgettable.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: IGFA Anglers Digest returns to Grand Cayman to fish and dive in this secluded piece of paradise. Known the world over for its world class scuba diving, those who really know the island come to fish as well.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: Having never been to these amazing Caribbean jewels, I can now see what everyone has raved about the last several years.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: Having never been to these amazing Caribbean jewels, I can now see what everyone has raved about the last several years.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: Leaving the hustle and bustle of Cabo we land in a neighboring city that houses the amazing new Puerto Los Cabo Marina. San Jose Del Cabo has some of the finest fishing in all of Baja located just outside the marina entrance.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: The Bass Pro Shops and Cabelas National Walleye Tour offers premier, tour-level competition for walleye anglers across the North. Each event features the biggest names in walleye fishing as they compete for big prizes while targeting big WALLEYE.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: How do Pros figure out what they will do at any given moment on the water? We’ll join Frank Talley, Keith Combs, and Clark Wendlandt as they breakdown the water, weather, and fishing conditions to find out how to trigger largemouth bass to bite.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: In this episode of Americana Outdoors we meet up with Wade Middleton as he shares his thoughts on Turkey hunting and why he enjoys it so much.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Hunting with air bows and air guns is growing in popularity across the nation. Here’s a look at several of our favorite hunts using these platforms by Umarex Airguns!

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: The lads are in Scotland and it's the middle of winter. They're on a mission to catch Ling from the WWI and WWII wrecks of Scapa Flow. It's cold, and the fish will be slow moving and tucked into and under the wrecked ships.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: It's the middle of winter and the lads are in Norway to catch the king crab. The team journey up the coast of Norway braving sub-zero temperatures and learning all they can along the way for their final mission, to dive under the ice.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A chimpanzee chases a volunteer, and a great white shark attacks a surfer.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A rattlesnake bites a man alone, and an alligator drags a woman underwater.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Dangerous gators convince the Gator Boys they need Jimmy back.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul tries to find help for injured alligator's mouth.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Two families are torn apart by one member's choice to keep big cats close at hand.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: An Australian man keeps two 10-foot saltwater crocs in a shed in his backyard. Aussie Vicky Lowing shares her suburban home with three pet crocodiles, one of whom she takes for drives in the car, another that lives in the bath.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: One man moves his family to a trailer where they share their space with more than 200 snakes. Another man continues to milk deadly snakes on a daily basis, despite developing a life-threatening allergy to venom.

programme.title: Morning Glory

programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: Mars Rising
programme.desc: The spacecraft that will take a crew to Mars will be assembled–in space. Will the fuel be thermo-nuclear or super-heated charged particles? Engineers must get it right–or the crew will die.

programme.title: Mars Rising
programme.desc: With zero gravity depleting muscle and cosmic radiation causing cancer, a three-year voyage to Mars in this environment could be punishing for the human body. How will we protect it?

programme.title: Mars Rising

programme.title: Mars Rising

programme.title: Mars Rising

programme.title: Mega Mechanics
programme.desc: The Mega Mechanics go into high gear with a massive bucket wheel gearbox change, a stubborn bolt and threatening weather may leave it swinging in the wind. And a mysterious liquid on another gearbox at a coal mine has the Mega Mechanics turn detectives.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: After experiencing a humiliating defeat by a Daimon, Makoto decides to retrain herself in the mountains.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako realizes that she is the only Sailor Guardian who has not been targeted by a Daimon.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.desc: Usagi is very intrigued when she hears Chibi-Usa is going to a 'friend’s' house to play.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un misterioso perro blanco deambula por los pasillos del hospital en Halloween.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El dueño de una joyería de 63 años recibe un disparo en el pecho durante un robo fallido. La reputación de la Dra. Michelle Finkel da un giro, cuando involuntariamente envía al paciente equivocado para una ecografía testicular.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre herido en una batalla medieval tiene una espada empalada en la cabeza; un paciente en estado crítico tiene tanto miedo a los gérmenes que no permite que los médicos lo traten.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Tres pacientes introducen a escondidas a sus mascotas en el hospital, provocando un caos en la sala de emergencias; un hombre experimenta una parálisis que sube desde las piernas hasta los pulmones.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La vida después de la muerte. Dos documentos, un ataque al corazón. Sobredosis de analgésicos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico trata a tres víctimas de disparos que afirman ser transeúntes inocentes, pero la policía quiere saber quién disparó a quién.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los doctores están desconcertados cuando traen a un almirante retirado y no entienden lo que lo debilita cada día más.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre piensa que está estreñido, pero su condición es potencialmente mortal; un médico que trata a una mujer con un paro cardíaco descubre que está tratando a dos pacientes en uno; y la familia del paciente no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer embarazada recibe un disparo en el abdomen, pero se niega a someterse a pruebas y tratamientos, poniendo en peligro su vida y la del bebé; una doctora es víctima de un robo de auto y cree que su paciente puede ser el culpable.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos realizan una incisión en el pecho mientras esperan a los cirujanos; Se introduce una iguana después de un accidente automovilístico.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un bebé aparentemente sano desarrolla repentinamente una deficiencia de oxígeno. Cuando la policía trae a un hombre desaliñado que dice ser el Ministro de un pequeño pueblo, el Dr. Kivela sospecha que hay más en la historia de lo que parece.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Cuando Kassie Arner, de 11 años, llega al Phoenix Children's Hospital, el intensivista pediátrico Dr. David Tellez cree que morirá. Los paramédicos traen a una adolescente que se niega a hablar y parece tener miedo de moverse.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un soldado llega a la sala de emergencias con una puñalada y una mujer toma una sobredosis de píldoras de dieta.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: La muerte de Fran Galdón delante de la comisaría supone un shock para todos. Un golpe terrible para la familia Galdón, creando un abismo entre Mauro e Irene que amenaza con destruirlos.

programme.title: Sin identidad
programme.desc: Madrid, 2013. María, bajo su identidad de Mercedes Dantés, sigue investigando a su familia para descubrir cómo han rehecho fácilmente sus vidas en su ausencia.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: El ex cirujano Dr. Martin Ellingham llega a la tranquila aldea de Portwenn en Cornualles, reemplazando al antiguo médico general que falleció.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: La clínica de Martin abre oficialmente como negocio, pero los pacientes continúan usándola como un café para reunirse.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Cuando una epidemia de diarrea azota la aldea, el doctor toma medidas inmediatas. Esto, sin embargo, esto no es bien aceptado por la población.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Agua seca' comienza cuando Paulo Duarte, un hombre portugués, es encontrado muerto en el Puerto de Vigo. Parece un suicidio, pero nadie a su alrededor puede entender por qué se suicida.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Después de que la policía encontró armas en el departamento de Paulo, el inspector Viñas y su compañera, Gabriela, profundizan en la investigación de la muerte de Paulo y el suicidio se convierte en un asesinato para ellos.

programme.title: Agua seca
programme.desc: Las últimas pistas encontradas por la policía les hacen pensar que Paulo estaba traficando con armas ilegalmente.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Cuando un policía británico es encontrado asesinado en la pequeña isla paradisíaca de Saint-Marie, el detective Richard Poole es enviado a investigar. Sería el hombre perfecto para resolver el caso, si no fuera porque odia el sol, el mar y la arena.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Mientras el detective anda en busca de una taza decente de té, una novia es asesinada el día de su boda. Es una tragedia que la sargenta Bordey no puede sino notificar, mientras que Richard está más interesado en las señales de los quehaceres domésticos.

programme.title: Crimen en el paraíso
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer no solo predice su propia muerte, sino que además brinda una descripción del asesinato, todo resulta aparentemente fácil para el detective Poole. ¿Puede un caso del pasado ayudar a resolver un crimen del presente?

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: Don y el equipo persiguen al asesino de dos escaladores en posesión de un diamante robado, mientras Charlie decide si reinstaurar su permiso del FBI, un nuevo agente se une al equipo en el estreno de la quinta temporada.

programme.title: Números
programme.desc: El equipo investiga una tendencia en aumento de secuestros en cajeros automáticos, cuando una mujer que fue secuestrada y obligada a retirar cantidades aleatorias de dinero en el cajero automático es asesinada.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement

programme.desc: When Jeff screws up paying for Audrey's Pilates classes, he reveals to Adam that he has a 'Bank' of mistakes that she has incurred that he uses to ease her anger. Russell sends an email to Timmy's crush.

programme.desc: When Audrey realizes Jeff is getting a bit bored in the bedroom, she tries to spice it up. Russell gets called out on a business trip, but has a fear of flying. He invites Timmy to distract him.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey embarks on a new start after quitting her demanding job; however, her time at home makes her stir crazy, prompting her to start a cookie business. Timmy is getting advice from the guys who encourage him to be more of a dude than a gentleman.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Stuck with a store Jeff leased for Audrey's fleeting cookie shop, he and Adam stay behind to clean up and discover a new game using the heads of mannequins.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Dr. Beckett (Paul McGillion) is asked to delay his departure from Atlantis when word comes that Major Anne Teldy (Christina Cox) and her away team have stumbled onto one of Michael’s abandoned labs inside an extensive underground catacomb.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finally discovers that Richard is back in New York, she offers him his old position back and Richard must decide if he wants to be in Caroline's life again.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After an emergency landing in Cleveland, sophisticated L.A. ladies Melanie, Joy, and Victoria decide to stay, then rent a house from the elderly caretaker Elka.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie coaches Elka in how to ask a guy out, Victoria makes repeat trips to a bulk warehouse store, and Joy thinks the younger man she's dating may be her son.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie, Joy and Victoria endure different forms of blind date disaster after setting each other up with men, while Elka hits it off with the charming Max.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria's lady-loving thespian father and Melanie's worrywart mother both visit the house, and Elka becomes buddies with Joy's critical mother via video chat.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: The women crash a Rock & Roll Hall of Fame party, where Melanie awkwardly meets her idol, and Victoria seeks revenge on her former bad boy flame Johnny Revere.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria is offered a Japanese commercial for an embarrassing product, and Melanie worries that local columnist Rick will write an unflattering piece about her.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While Victoria and Joy try to dissuade Melanie from getting back together with her ex-husband, Elka is caught in a love triangle between Max and Nick.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Joy feels abandoned by Melanie, who is focusing on her new boyfriend Pete, and a theatrical teenager asks Victoria to advise his high school production of Shakespeare.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Lindsey gets her first job at a fast food restaurant, but soon gets fired when she gives out free food.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Nick tries to become a more effective parent, so he pushes Kevin and Lindsey to become better people.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Against Nick's wishes, Suzanne buys an expensive purse and Nick becomes suspicious about it, so he uses her guilt to his advantage.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: A meteor causes Sonic and Eggman to exchange bodies. / Orbot and Cubot wake up with no memory of the previous day's events and discover that Eggman is missing.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Thanks to the school bully, Pac-Man accidentally opens the portal to the Netherworld, unleashing an army of ghosts. Lucky for Pac-World, young Pac has the ability to eat the ghosts and burp out their eyeballs!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac fails his driver's license test because of a ridiculously strict Hovering Vehicles Department employee, Mr. Strickler. Then, to save Pac-World, Pac has to fly the Paccerchini into the Netherworld,

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: It looks like Betrayus' fortunes are changing when he summons a Nether-Witch to curse Pac Man with bad luck. The only catch is, the witch will only turn over the potion if Betrayus promises to marry her.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks lures a giant Ghosteroidto threaten PacWorld, and Pac-Man must grow to planet proportions to save the day. But who's gonna save Planet Pac from the repercussions of his enlargement?

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Once every 100 Halloweens, the two moons of PacWorld turn blue, so Betrayus summons the sinister Count Pacula to drain the last Yellow Orb in PacWorld - namely Pac-Man!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee and Squirt are flabbergasted when Gretchen's parents turn out to be the famous action-star couple, the Gritchersons! The kids discover an interdimensional portal to travel back and forth between parallel Lakebottom dimensions.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: After Rosebud unwittingly tries to cook a talking squirrel, she and the kids are pulled into a squirrel-based dimension to be judged by a jury of their squirrel-peers. McGee has a bad dream where he strolls into the dining hall in his underwear!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: When a DISCO-BALL MOON rises over Lakebottom, Rosebud and Armand warn the kids to stop ALL partying at once, lest the strange Party Animal appears! The kids discover an elephant that befriends Gretch!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The staff try to up their Summerween game, by building a haunted house that will scare the bottomdwellers! The kids are now stuck inside the House of Horrors, determined to figure out who Gluteus Crouch really is!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: A storm gives McGee a nasal infection that allows him to see the future. When Slimey ditches the bottomdwellers, the kids are determined to find out where he went.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: An old McGee travels back from the future to present-day to stop a BBQ that infects the staff with MONSTER VIRUS! After the letters that McGee wrote to his mom are returned to sender, the Lakebottom Crew hits the road to find out what happened.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a hard decision about her family. Leah tries to balance Ali and Aleeah's unique needs. Kail juggles three different coparenting relationships. Bar starts college while Ashley plans a birthday surprise.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behavior wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Briana travels for surgery, but returns to something shocking. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about the lump on her breast.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's career is moving forward, but her relationship with Sean begins to slip. While Ashley prepares to receive her Associate's Degree, Bar's schoolwork hits a road black. As Leah's second ultrasound approaches, she braces for the results.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail faces a court battle with Chris. Bar's DUI resurfaces & threatens to ruin Ashley's graduation party. Leah finds out if she needs surgery on her tumor. After meeting with a lawyer about Luis' parental rights, Briana is left with some hard choices.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: All of the TMOGs are anxious to find out if Ashley said "yes" to Bar's proposal. Amber gets Leah's fear that pain medication will cause a relapse. Cate and Tyler feel for Jade's struggles with the pressures of moving, parenting and filming.

programme.desc: Cate and Tyler are delighted when Kail lets Isaac design his own room. Maci, Taylor and Raj dismiss the ring Sean gives Jade. Chey and her family enjoy meeting Briana's mysterious new boyfriend. Amber and Tonya worry about Leah's Covid exposure.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: Everyone is horrified by Jade's plastic surgery experience but are grateful Briana steps in to help out. Cheyenne and family cheer on Ashley as she moves while planning her wedding. Amber and Krystal celebrate Leah, who gets Ali a new wheelchair.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Girls Night In
programme.desc: From laughing at their kids' tantrums to sympathizing with parental struggles, our Teen Mom OG and Teen Mom 2 moms unleash their personal opinions on the biggest moments from a recent season Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar revela el dolor que siente por el pasado y por el delito que cometió contra Emilio del Monte. José está dispuesto a unirse a él a pesar de las sospechas que han sido levantadas por Sofía en torno al accidente que provocó la muerte de Gustavo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Sara se presentan en la iglesia, pero Jimena y Óscar ya están casados. Él cuenta su versión de la estafa y libra a Eva de toda responsabilidad al contratarlos, Juan lo interrumpe.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar rechaza el dinero que le ofrece Gabriela para que se separe de su hija, ella acepta el consejo de Sara y arruina los planes de su yerno, Jimena pierde los beneficios de ser una Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le asegura a Fernando que se entregará a él como su esposa, él reacciona con soberbia. Jimena pregunta por Libia, a pesar de los esfuerzos de Juan por mantener ocultos sus recuerdos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara se interpone en una decisión de Norma, ellas pierden la paciencia en medio de una discusión. Jimena encuentra un regalo con una nota escrita, la letra es igual a la de su padre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acompaña a Gabriela para rescatar a Jimena, su madre se ofende al saber que ella trabaja en la panadería de Juan. Rosario renuncia al bar para irse de gira con otro representante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela ve a Norma y a Juan cuando se besan, ella le revela quién es el padre de su hijo, su madre cae desmayada, mientras Fernando escucha tras la puerta y sale armado de la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando encuentra a su esposa con las maletas listas, él le deja el camino libre, Gabriela prefiere que se vaya su hija y no Fernando. Juan se angustia porque no conoce la decisión de Norma.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena invita a Norma a cenar en la casa de Juan, él tiene miedo de perderla. Franco recibe una oferta de trabajo de Eduvina Trueba, una viuda millonaria que hace lo imposible para seducirlo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela piensa en el cumpleaños de Jimena, cree que es un día amargo para su hija, pero Norma y ella se divierten con Juan y Óscar. Franco se enreda al aceptar ser el secretario de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia, una de las vendedoras del mercado, le cuenta todo a Jimena acerca de la muerte de Libia. Franco renuncia a su empleo con Eduvina, y ella le arma un escándalo a Rosario en el bar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cree que Juan y Óscar quieren envenenarla a ella y a su hermana, tras golpear a su esposo, Norma la rescata en la calle. Franco es traicionado por Rosario y Eduvina intenta suicidarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Several teams come together and target one set of Racers at the double U-turn in Italy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Venice, Italy where one team reaches a breaking point in a frantic search for a water taxi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While driving to the Detour, one team ends up going the wrong way, and a surprising U-turn causes friction between racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An extreme fear of heights paralyzes one Racer at a Roadblock when faced with bungee jumping 240 feet from a bridge into the Corinth Canal.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams battle the scorching heat while transporting shrimp baskets for one mile to a local fisherman, and one Racer approaches their breaking point during the exhausting Roadblock.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes a newspaper publisher and proceeds to put out a scandal sheet and distributes free samples.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invents a beau. When she's pressed for a name she names the butter and egg man who is married.

programme.desc: Comedian Don Rickles guest stars as Newton Monroe, an itinerant peddler who seems unable to do anything right.

programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife helps Opie with his schoolwork, using a teaching method all his own.

programme.desc: Opie gets a part-time job in a grocery store, but gives it up because another boy needs employment more.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy hires a rock-throwing rustic as a school crossing guard and compounds the problem by replacing him with a bicyclist.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Has Aunt Bee discovered the fountain of youth when she starts dating elderly congressmen?

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's eager-beaver deputy jails Aunt Bee and her friends for gambling at their charity bazaar.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's deputy upsets his weekend when he insists his extrasensory powers predict a picnic will prove disastrous.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Taylor family leaves for a Hollywood vacation.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Taylor family starts an exciting vacation in Hollywood including a visit to a movie studio.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy poses for a picture with a Hollywood starlet and his romance with Helen is jolted when it appears in the Mayberry paper.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee wins a kitchen-full of appliances on a TV show but loses all her friends.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Warren captures a pair of thieves through sheer stupidity about the functions of a cannon.

programme.desc: The winner is announced in the competition between Alicia and Cary.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: At Eli Gold's urging, Alicia must decide if she'll stand by her man during Peter's new political campaign, or if she'll pursue a relationship with Will instead.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Torn between her passion for Will and her marriage to Peter, Alicia is forced to make her choice.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: A multi-million dollar malicious prosecution suit leads to an explosive confrontation between Alicia and Glenn Childs. Meanwhile, Alicia's brother, Owen, visits after his questionable remarks about Peter goes viral online and makes Eli apoplectic.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia risks disbarment when Childs' office suspects her of an ethics violation, which could also ruin Peter's political campaign. Meanwhile, a third candidate is revealed in the campaign for state's attorney.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia, Diane, and Will must regroup when caught off-guard by a brilliant disabled attorney, Louis Canning (Michael J. Fox), who uses his condition to sway a jury during a test case for a huge class action suit against a pharmaceutical company.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia is on the road to successfully argue that her teenage pop star client, Sloan, is innocent of a DUI until Cary drops a bombshell that could ruin the starlet's career and life. Meanwhile, Peter's campaign hits a snag.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When the government accuses an alderman of taking a campaign bribe from a Muslim extremist group, the team reviews hours of wiretap evidence to mount his defense, and Alicia is startled to discover that some of the tapes pertain to her.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When Alicia gets a vague tip from a courthouse clerk in the appeal case of a death row inmate, the law firm races to secure a stay of execution. Meanwhile, Peter Florrick prepares for his first debate with Glenn Childs and Wendy Scott-Carr.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia and her colleagues face a moral dilemma when they must try to turn a client's son against his girlfriend, after both are accused of murder. Meanwhile, Diane asks Alicia to make a tough decision regarding the company's split.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for some of his scariest animal encounters with Lions, Crocodiles, Snakes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wild Hair
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six warm and fuzzy tales about animals sporting funky fur! Musk ox, giraffe, tapir, bison, cheetah and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Adaptations
programme.desc: From the Arctic to the desert, animals have found a way to survive and thrive in every eco-system on the planet. Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing animal adaptations.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading into devil country in Tasmania, Australia to meet up with leading-edge researchers who are working to save Tasmanian Devils from a deadly cancer that is wiping out the population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he visits the tropical island of Borneo in Malaysia where he comes face-to-face with unique proboscis monkeys.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hair Raising Adventures
programme.desc: Today, Jack is counting down six nerve-wracking adventures that are NOT for the faint of heart. Diving deep underwater in a submarine, trekking into Mandrill country, coming face-to-face with a mountain lion and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers six creatures with supreme senses, like the animal with the most powerful snout, to a creature with razor-sharp eyesight. Crocs, Elephants, Sharks, Bats, Peregrine Falcons and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Greatest Apes
programme.desc: There are more than 200 different kinds of primates in the world today, but did you know only five are members of the exclusive club of great apes? Come along with Jack as he counts down his greatest great ape encounters!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack enters the Mouth of Bull, in Panama's Bocas del Toro! Poison Dart Frogs, Snakes, Jellyfish, Sloths and so much more on this adventure to Panama's Caribbean Coast!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue meet up with renowned conservationists Chryssee and Esmond Bradley Martin in Kenya and see hyenas, warthogs, and even a cheetah, before searching for white rhinos in Nairobi National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Suzanne as they put their skills to the test at Shamwari's Ranger School where they must experience everything from driving a 4x4, to tracking animals on foot, including a very up-close look at a pride of hungry Lions.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On Vancouver Island, in British Columbia, Jack and his daughter Kathaleen experience Canada from above and below the water.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family for an unforgettable adventure through Alberta, Canada! Jack kicks off his journey in Waterton – home to the world's first international peace park – before heading into the Canadian Rockies in search of moose.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack treks deep into the rainforests of Gabon in search of Mandrills. The elusive and brightly colored primates are the largest monkeys in the world, and can only be found in Africa's equatorial rainforests.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Seminole country in the Florida Everglades and gets way more than he bargained for. This adventure's got him uncovering alligator nests, and wranglin' some big gators that need to be released back into the wild.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Ecuador's diverse landscapes are home to loads of unique creatures. Visit the Mashpi cloud forests, home to hummingbirds and bushmasters; witness birds of prey in flight near Otavalo's colorful markets; and the Quito Zoo welcomes a baby jaguar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Against all Odds
programme.desc: Today, see six special stories of survival. Battling everything from injuries to extinction, meet the amazing creatures that beat the odds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen depart Juneau, Alaska aboard the Wilderness Explorer in search of the endless natural beauty of Glacier Bay. Among their encounters: are bears, humpback whales, and glaciers. Jack also explores an old gold mine.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack heads south from the tip of South America to the frozen wonderland of Antarctica. During his adventures, Jack experiences a colony of Gento Penguins and the desolation of Deception Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he heads back to his old stomping grounds near Knoxville, Tennessee! He takes his family to his old farm, the Knoxville Zoo, and the University of Tennessee for a special visit with Smokey the Dog.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Extreme Destinations
programme.desc: From the mountain gorillas of the Impenetrable Forest, the Andean cat of the Atacama Desert, to the penguins of Antarctica, join Jungle Jack as he counts down the most extreme animal destinations on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In South Africa, Jack checks out the endangered species breeding program at Sable Ranch. Jack's ranch adventures include a helicopter round up of sable and roan antelope, as well as the trans-location of a white rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Back to the Wild
programme.desc: When animals get injured in the wild, conservationists and veterinarians step in to lend a helping hand. In this Wild Countdown Jack is counting down six special stories of lucky creatures returning to their native habitats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they visit an Australian rainforest and have birds eating out of their hands. Then the whole family goes climbing to find out how life is like in the treetops and Jack discovers a rare wild bird.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Cruise
programme.desc: Doc marries a younger woman only to run into his ex-wife while on his honeymoon. Meanwhile, a voluptuous diet doctor hires a svelte fitness instructor to impersonate her, and a man has to tell his partner their relationship may be over.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A hurricane devastates the tropical island where a shore party of Capt. Stubing, his crew members, and passengers are held captive by a strange hermit while the Pacific Princess totters under the command of a bumbling deputy captain.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In Part 2, the captain and crew are still marooned.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie's parents arrive on board the Pacific Princess and announce their plans to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing's Uncle Cyrus uses every trick in his devious mind to get Julie alone, until her "Aunt Phoebe" intervenes; a desperate businessman uses his daughter as bait to close a deal.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A shy young man becomes a completely different person at night; a businessman who doesn't have time for his family learns a valuable lesson.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A magician keeps his engagement secret in order to dazzle female audiences, while his neglected fiancee turns to Captain Stubing for comfort.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Accidental Cruise," the executive and his secretary come aboard a bit tipsy, are mistaken for another couple, and assigned the honeymoon suite.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A ghost experiences jealousy as his mission to find his wife a new husband appears to be succeeding.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Crew members make a valiant effort to keep six stowaways a secret from Capt. Stubing; a church member disapproves of her minister's new romance; a nearly-blind woman refuses to admit her problem until Doc intercedes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Two passengers place a bet on who can win Julie's affections first. A son who loves his parents is shocked when he discovers his fiance doesn't.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.
